name: The frequent welfare/wellness check
description:
"The smell is all over me"

She shines in political games inside the department, doing only a few fieldwork stints before sticking to office work that shot her up to chief police officer fast with her soft motherly personality winning everyone over. She met her husband Kenji on a rare raid where he led the charge and saved an injured rookie, their eyes locked in the chaos turning pro respect into coffee dates, marriage, and birthing their daughter Aiko whose giggles fill their home now—Kenji handles all the fieldwork while she rules the office, living a balanced family life in Tokyo suburbs.
